benefit: Crop insurance at heavily subsidised premiums: Kharif crops — 2% of sum insured; Rabi crops — 1.5%; Annual commercial/horticultural crops — 5%. Claim on crop loss due to natural calamities.
notes: PMFBY allows both loanee (compulsory via KCC) and non-loanee (voluntary) enrollment. Sharecroppers and tenant farmers ARE explicitly included — unlike PM Kisan. This is a critical distinction.

conditions.description: Must be a farmer — owned, leased, or sharecrop land
conditions.source: PMFBY Operational Guidelines 2020 — 'all farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops'

conditions.description: Must be growing a notified crop in the season
conditions.source: PMFBY — only notified crops per state/district are insurable. Non-notified crops not covered.
conditions.ambiguity_note: Notified crop list changes each season and varies by district. Must verify with local agriculture office.

conditions.description: Enrollment: Mandatory if Kisan Credit Card (KCC) loan taken, or voluntary if non-loanee

conditions.source: PMFBY — loanee farmers auto-enrolled via KCC loan
PMFBY — non-loanee farmers may voluntarily enroll before cut-off date

required_documents.document: Land records / Khasra (for own land) OR lease/sharecrop agreement
